hero.subtitle: 1.7 million m² of living ecosystem. A unique destination where startups, corporations and government build the impact businesses that move Brazil forward.

ecossistema.titleStart: The only urban technology park in Brazil in
ecossistema.p1: Pedra Branca Technology Park is a planned city inside Palhoça (SC): 1.7 million m² where living, working and innovating happen at the same address. Unlike traditional tech parks, here the ecosystem is alive — with homes, retail, universities and tech companies sharing the same block.
ecossistema.p2: Inaitec was born within this environment and serves as the link connecting startups, corporations and government to the infrastructure, networks and programs that turn ideas into real impact businesses.

contato.descPrefix: Our team responds within 48h. Write to

quote.text: Inaitec changed the course of my company. The mentorship and ecosystem network gave me the support I needed to grow with confidence.
quote.author: Naira Oliveira

items.quote: Inaitec connected us with investors and partner hospitals in record time. Based at Pedra Branca, we scaled from 3 to 40 employees in less than a year.
Having our office in the park gave us access to talent from UFSC and Unisul. We closed our first corporate contract 3 months after moving in.
The credibility of the Pedra Branca ecosystem opened doors at city halls we would never reach on our own. The park is our biggest showcase.
The Inaitec environment accelerated our learning curve. We found the right partners here to bring our platform to more than 50 institutions.

faq.desc: Didn't find what you were looking for? Talk to our team.

items.q: What is Inaitec and how does it work?
items.a: Inaitec is the innovation and technology hub of Pedra Branca Technology Park, in Palhoça (SC, Brazil). We connect startups, companies, universities and government through structured programs of acceleration, open innovation and technology transfer.

items.q: How can I take part in Acelera Pedra Branca?
items.a: Applications happen through public calls announced on this site and our social channels. The selection process includes proposal review, interviews and a pitch. Keep an eye on the open calls.

items.q: Can my company set up at Pedra Branca Park?
items.a: Yes. The park has spaces for companies of all sizes — from coworking to headquarters. Get in touch with our team to learn about the installation options and ecosystem benefits.

items.q: How does open innovation work for medium and large companies?
items.a: We map your company's strategic challenges and connect you with selected startups from the ecosystem to develop pilots and validated solutions. The whole process is structured and guided by the Inaitec team.

items.q: Are there funding opportunities available for startups?
items.a: Yes, we run our own calls and partner with FINEP, BNDES, city governments and partner companies. Current opportunities are always listed in the Open Calls section of the site.

ctaBanner.desc: Startups, companies and government at a single address — Pedra Branca, SC.

EcosystemAccordion.desc: Each pillar connects an audience to programs, networks and unique opportunities within the ecosystem.

pillars.label: Startups and Small Businesses
pillars.subtitle: Acceleration & Growth
pillars.desc: Intensive programs that connect early-stage startups and small businesses to qualified mentorship, structured investment and direct routes to market.

pillars.label: Large and Medium Enterprises
pillars.subtitle: Open Innovation
pillars.desc: Large and medium enterprises meet disruptive startups to co-create real solutions. From curation to pilot, we structure the match and measure results.

pillars.label: Universities and Government
pillars.subtitle: Science & Public Policy
pillars.desc: Universities, research institutes and the public sector connected to the ecosystem for technology transfer, applied research and regional development.

pillars.label: Investors
pillars.subtitle: Capital & Opportunities
pillars.desc: Curated access to validated startups, qualified deal flow and connection with national and international co-investors. From angels to venture capital.

events.title: Inaitec is founded
events.desc: The innovation hub is born at Pedra Branca Technology Park, with the mission of connecting startups, companies and government in a single ecosystem.

events.title: First acceleration programs
events.desc: Launch of the first acceleration cohorts, training startups with intensive mentorship and connection to the Santa Catarina market.

events.title: International Missions
events.desc: Global expansion with the first missions to Silicon Valley and Europe, opening doors for Brazilian startups in international markets.

events.title: +100 companies in the ecosystem
events.desc: Milestone of 100 companies installed in the park, consolidating Pedra Branca as the largest urban innovation ecosystem in Brazil.

events.title: Open Innovation with Corporations
events.desc: Structuring of open innovation programs, connecting large companies and the public sector to solutions developed by the hub's startups.

events.title: Where Inaitec is today
events.desc: 17 years of a consolidated ecosystem. Inaitec is today the largest urban innovation hub in southern Brazil, in full operation at Pedra Branca Technology Park.
